name: Anju Jain
profileSummary: Anju Jain is an Indian former cricketer and current cricket coach. She played as a wicket-keeper and right-handed batter. She appeared in eight Test matches and 65 One Day Internationals for India between 1993 and 2005. She played domestic cricket for Delhi and Air India. She has previously coached the India and Bangladesh national women's teams, and currently coaches on the Indian domestic circuit.
